data.text: I found the server-side test file that already pins the behavior. Next I’m reading the worker manager and those tests together so I can remove the preflight wiring and decide whether the existing server test should be rewritten or deleted.

The worker file currently doesn’t show the old preflight helper in the portion I read, which suggests either it’s already been partially removed or it lives in a helper I haven’t hit yet. I’m locating every worker-side call site before I patch so I don’t leave a hidden ResolveRoute path behind.

data.text: The worker preflight helper looks absent already, so this may be a narrower cleanup pass than the bead title suggests. I’m running the relevant test subsets from `cli/` now to see whether anything still fails or whether the remaining work is only evidence and commit hygiene.

I’ve got the targeted test runs in flight. If they come back green, I’ll verify the exact file/line evidence against the bead acceptance and then either make the minimal code/doc adjustment or close this as a no-change attempt with concrete proof.

data.text: The tree is clean, and the specific files the bead names already reflect the no-preflight state. I’m writing the required no-change evidence file with an executable verification command so the orchestrator can close this attempt without a fake code commit.
I’ve written the evidence file. I’m running the exact verification command once here as well so I can confirm the repo is actually green before I hand control back.

input.command: /bin/zsh -lc "cd cli && go test ./internal/server -run 'TestWorker.*ResolveRoute|TestWorker_NoPreflight|TestRunWorker' -count=1 && go test ./cmd -run 'TestRoutinglintNoResolveRouteInExecutionPaths|TestRoutinglintNonStatusFilesDoNotCallResolveRoute|TestWorkDoesNotCallResolveRoute' -count=1 && cd .. && lefthook run pre-commit"

   154	// TestWorkerExecutionDoesNotCallResolveRouteForPinnedProfileOrModel verifies
   155	// that server-managed execute-loop workers proceed through ExecuteBeadWithConfig
   156	// without consulting ResolveRoute, even when the worker spec pins a model.
   157	func TestWorkerExecutionDoesNotCallResolveRouteForPinnedProfileOrModel(t *testing.T) {
   158		t.Setenv("DDX_DISABLE_UPDATE_CHECK", "1")
   159	
   160		svc := installResolveRouteFailingService(t)
   161		root := setupWorkerResolveRouteRepo(t)
   162		store := bead.NewStore(filepath.Join(root, ".ddx"))
   163		require.NoError(t, store.Init())
   164		require.NoError(t, store.Create(&bead.Bead{
   165			ID:    "ddx-worker-resolve-route-test",
   166			Title: "worker resolve-route regression bead",
   167		}))
   168	
   169		m := NewWorkerManager(root)
   170		defer m.StopWatchdog()
   171	
   172		record, err := m.StartExecuteLoop(ExecuteLoopWorkerSpec{
   173			Harness: "agent",
   174			Model:   "gpt-5.4-mini",
   175			Once:    true,
   176		})
   177		require.NoError(t, err)
   178	
   179		final := waitForWorkerExit(t, m, record.ID, 10*time.Second)
   180		assert.NotEqual(t, "failed", final.State, "worker should complete without a ResolveRoute failure")
   181	
   182		svc.mu.Lock()
   183		executeCalled := svc.executeCalled
   184		resolveCalled := svc.resolveCalled
   185		lastReq := svc.lastExecuteReq
   186		svc.mu.Unlock()
   187	
   188		require.True(t, executeCalled, "worker must reach Execute")
   189		assert.False(t, resolveCalled, "worker execution must not call ResolveRoute")
   190		assert.Equal(t, "agent", lastReq.Harness, "harness pin must pass through to Execute")
   191		assert.Equal(t, "gpt-5.4-mini", lastReq.Model, "model pin must pass through to Execute")
   192	}
   193	
   194	// TestWorkerRoutinglintNoResolveRouteInExecutionPaths guards the server-side
   195	// execution path against future ResolveRoute reintroduction in workers.go.
   196	func TestWorkerRoutinglintNoResolveRouteInExecutionPaths(t *testing.T) {
   197		fset := token.NewFileSet()
   198		f, err := parser.ParseFile(fset, "workers.go", nil, 0)
   199		require.NoError(t, err)
   200	
   201		ast.Inspect(f, func(n ast.Node) bool {
   202			call, ok := n.(*ast.CallExpr)
   203			if !ok {
   204				return true
   205			}
   206			sel, ok := call.Fun.(*ast.SelectorExpr)
   207			if !ok {
   208				return true
   209			}
   210			if sel.Sel.Name == "ResolveRoute" {
   211				t.Errorf("routinglint: workers.go calls .ResolveRoute() at %s — execution paths must not pre-resolve routes", fset.Position(call.Pos()))
   212			}
   213			return true
   214		})
   215	}

No source changes were needed in this worktree: the worker execution path already omits any `ResolveRoute` preflight, and the boundary is covered by tests.

Evidence:
- Worker execution flow is in [`cli/internal/server/workers.go`](file:///tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-a2212280-20260505T181526-59d0b708/cli/internal/server/workers.go), with `runWorker` calling `ExecuteBeadWithConfig` directly and no `buildRoutePreflight` / `RoutePreflight` wiring in the execution path.
- The server-side regression test is in [`cli/internal/server/workers_resolve_route_test.go`](file:///tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-a2212280-20260505T181526-59d0b708/cli/internal/server/workers_resolve_route_test.go#L154-L214), and it asserts that execute-loop workers proceed without calling `ResolveRoute`.
- The CLI routing lint remains in [`cli/cmd/routinglint_test.go`](file:///tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-a2212280-20260505T181526-59d0b708/cli/cmd/routinglint_test.go#L24-L110), which keeps `ResolveRoute` out of execution-path commands.

Verification:
- `cd cli && go test ./internal/server -run 'TestWorker.*ResolveRoute|TestWorker_NoPreflight|TestRunWorker' -count=1`
- `cd cli && go test ./cmd -run 'TestRoutinglintNoResolveRouteInExecutionPaths|TestRoutinglintNonStatusFilesDoNotCallResolveRoute|TestWorkDoesNotCallResolveRoute' -count=1`
- `lefthook run pre-commit`

I also wrote the required no-change evidence file at [`/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-a2212280-20260505T181526-59d0b708/.ddx/executions/20260505T181526-59d0b708/no_changes_rationale.txt`](file:///tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-a2212280-20260505T181526-59d0b708/.ddx/executions/20260505T181526-59d0b708/no_changes_rationale.txt).
